description: Analyze homing pigeon orientation data using circular statistics in R with the `pigeons` dataset from the `circular` package. Compare the 'control' and 'experimental' groups (provided as list components in degrees) by generating a summary CSV at `/home/ga/RProjects/output/pigeon_summary.csv` including columns for group, n, mean_direction_deg, mean_resultant_length, and rayleigh_p_value. Conduct a Watson-Williams test to compare the mean directions of the two groups, saving the test_name, statistic, p_value, and significant_diff (based on p < 0.05) to `/home/ga/RProjects/output/pigeon_test.csv`. Produce a Rose Diagram comparing the groups and save the visualization to `/home/ga/RProjects/output/pigeon_rose_plot.png`.
